summary: The 4 high-priority issues from review #17 are ALL FIXED — timezone greeting now uses Intl.DateTimeFormat, tabpanels have tabIndex={0}, tablist has aria-label='View selector', and deep-glow is in the reduced-motion block. Score up to 3.9/5. Remaining debt is mostly medium-priority accessibility and code cleanup that's been carried forward for several reviews.

suggestions.title: Confetti layer still plays unconditionally for reduced-motion users
suggestions.description: App.jsx renders 30 confetti-piece spans with CSS animation. No prefers-reduced-motion check exists — either suppress confetti in CSS or add a JS matchMedia check to skip rendering entirely. This was flagged in #17 as medium but promoting to high since all other reduced-motion gaps are fixed.

suggestions.title: Bloberto speech bubbles have no keyboard/focus trigger
suggestions.description: Office.jsx Character component only uses onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave for speech bubbles. Keyboard-only users can never trigger Bloberto quotes. Add tabIndex={0} and onFocus/onBlur handlers to the manager character div.

suggestions.title: Character tooltips (data-tooltip) are hover-only — no keyboard access
suggestions.description: Working characters show task info via CSS ::after on hover. No tabIndex or focus handler exists on non-manager characters. Keyboard and screen reader users get no info. Add tabIndex={0} and focus-visible styling.

suggestions.title: Activity log relative timestamps never tick
suggestions.description: getRelativeTime() is called only at render time. If the tab stays open, '2m ago' stays '2m ago' forever. Add a 60s interval to bump a tick counter that triggers re-render of timestamps.

suggestions.title: DEFAULT_ROSTER still lives in Office.jsx — should be in constants.js
suggestions.description: ROLE_EMOJIS and ROLE_COLORS were extracted to utils/constants.js. DEFAULT_ROSTER was not. Move it for consistency and reuse.

suggestions.title: Dead CSS in App.css: .hire-form-*, .hq-badge, .btn-danger
suggestions.description: App.css still contains ~80 lines of unused CSS for hire-form, hq-badge, and btn-danger. None of these exist in App.jsx anymore. This has been flagged since review #14. Delete them.

suggestions.title: .progress-bar-inner in App.css reduced-motion targets wrong class
suggestions.description: App.css reduced-motion block references .progress-bar-inner but the actual class is .progress-bar-fill. The rule does nothing.

suggestions.title: Idle duration on characters never updates
suggestions.description: Office.jsx formatIdleDuration() is pure — called once at render. An idle worker showing '5m' will show '5m' forever if no re-render is triggered. Same pattern as the activity log timestamps.

suggestions.title: No keyboard shortcut discovery for tab switching
suggestions.description: Pressing 1/2 switches tabs but there's no tooltip or hint. Add title attributes to tab buttons: 'Office view (press 1)' and 'Dashboard view (press 2)'.

suggestions.title: Date display in header uses viewer locale, not consistent
suggestions.description: Line 597: new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', ...) — this is fine for formatting but doesn't use the PST timezone, so date can be wrong near midnight for non-PST viewers. Minor but inconsistent with the now-fixed greeting.

suggestions.title: MANAGER_QUOTES array is redundant with VIBE_QUOTES
suggestions.description: Office.jsx has both MANAGER_QUOTES (line 13) and VIBE_QUOTES (line 23). MANAGER_QUOTES is only used as fallback when managerVibe is undefined, which shouldn't happen. Could be removed.

suggestions.title: WindowElement re-renders every 60s even when hour hasn't changed
suggestions.description: The setInterval in WindowElement fires every 60s and calls setHour(getHour()). Since the hour only changes once per hour, 59 of 60 calls are no-ops. Minor but could use a smarter check.
